parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-3 progressionRulesEngine parity — conservative top+backoff. A compound templateExercise (repMin 6 / repMax 8 / sets 3 / startWeight 60 / conservativeTopSet true / fatigueCost 'high') whose two recent sessions both hit the rep ceiling drives the conservativeBias hold: shouldAdd false (conservativeTopSet gates it), nextWeight = lastWeight (60), nextReps = repMin (conservativeBias rep clamp), note '已经打到过一次上限，再稳一练再加重'. shouldUseTopBackoff true; buildSetPrescription emits the CONSERVATIVE high-fatigue top+backoff prescription ('保守版', backoff drop 0.86). FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: deterministicClockIso anchored in the PAST => live fineTune window empty (golden-neutral). Sessions NEWEST-FIRST: both hit repMax but conservativeTopSet vetoes shouldAdd => conservative hold; conservativeTopSet+fatigueCost high drive the conservative buildSetPrescription branch.
